import {
  ColorScales,
  TypographySamples,
  RadiusSamples,
} from "./theme-demo";

# Theme & Design Tokens

A single stylesheet (`tokens.css`) defines every color, size, and motion value in Patch UI. Components read from it through Tailwind utilities. Light and dark switch from one `.dark` class on `<html>`. No JavaScript required.

The token scale structure (100→1000 with a consistent intent per step), the four-family typography scale, the two-tone background approach, and the specific palette hues are adapted from [Vercel Geist](https://vercel.com/geist). The implementation, the compound utility classes, and the `check:contrast` gate are ours. See [Credits](/docs/credits) for the full attribution.

## Colors

Every color scale runs `100` (lightest fill) to `1000` (heaviest text) with the same intent at each step:

| Step | Role |
|------|------|
| `100` – `300` | fills (background, hover, active) |
| `400` – `600` | borders (rest, hover, active) |
| `700` – `800` | solid (button background, saturated fill + its hover) |
| `900` – `1000` | text (secondary, primary) |

<ColorScales />

**Also available:**
- `--gray-alpha-100` through `--gray-alpha-1000` for hover states that need to sit on any background color.
- `--background-100` (canvas) and `--background-200` (lightly elevated). In dark mode both are near-black; elevation comes from border and shadow, not brightness.
- `--error`, `--warning`, `--success` (plus `-hover` and `-active` variants) as fixed hex values that read identically in both themes.

## Typography

Four families cover every use. Each class applies size, line-height, tracking, and weight in one shot.

<TypographySamples />

## Sizing and motion

**Radius.** Four values only.

<RadiusSamples />

Controls use `radius-6`, surfaces use `radius-12`, marketing chrome uses `radius-16`, chips use `radius-full`.

**Shadows.** Elevation is flat with 1px hairline borders. Shadows appear only on overlays: `--shadow-card` (marketing cards), `--shadow-menu` (popovers, menus, tooltips), `--shadow-modal` (dialogs, sheets).

**Motion.** One easing (`--ease-standard`), two durations: `--duration-state` (75ms, for hover/active transitions) and `--duration-overlay` (150ms, for open/close). Under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`, both collapse to `0ms` automatically.

**Focus.** A 1px neutral outline via `--focus-ring-color` and `--focus-ring-offset`. Consumed through the shared `focusRing` recipe so every component matches.

**Spacing.** Tailwind's default `p-*`, `m-*`, `gap-*`, `h-*` utilities are unchanged (`0.25rem` multiplier). Named `--space-4` through `--space-96` variables are exposed at `:root` if you need exact pixel alignment in a token-critical layout.

## Customizing

Every token is a plain CSS variable. Override in your own CSS after importing the tokens and every component picks up the change at runtime, no rebuild required:

```css
/* app/globals.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "./styles/patch-ui-tokens.css";

:root {
  --gray-1000: #0a0a0a;
}

.dark {
  --gray-1000: #f5f5f5;
}
```

If you edit a color that affects readable text, run `npm run check:contrast -w packages/react` to verify the [contrast contract](/docs/contrast) still holds.
